result:
# Introducing Smart Drafts

We've all been there — cursor blinking on an empty page, the clock ticking, and somehow the hardest part of writing anything is just getting started. After hearing this from so many of you, we're thrilled to introduce **Smart Drafts**, a new way to begin any document with momentum instead of dread. The blank page problem is real, and we wanted to meet it head-on with something that feels less like a template and more like a thoughtful collaborator nudging you forward.

Smart Drafts works with a single click. When you open a new document, give it a title, and tap the ✨ icon — we'll generate a tailored outline based on your title and the context of documents you've been working on recently. Writing a project kickoff after a week of planning notes? You'll get an outline that reflects that. Drafting a retro after a sprint? It'll know. The suggestions are yours to keep, rearrange, or toss entirely — it's a starting point, never a prescription. Everything happens in the draft itself, so your flow stays uninterrupted.

This is just the beginning. We're already working on **custom voice training**, which will let Smart Drafts learn the way *you* write — your cadence, your phrasing, the little turns of language that make a document feel like yours. We'll have more to share on that in the coming months. In the meantime, give Smart Drafts a spin on your next doc and let us know what you think. As always, thank you for building with us.

# Introducing Smart Drafts

We've all been there — cursor blinking on an empty page, the clock ticking, and somehow the hardest part of writing anything is just getting started. After hearing this from so many of you, we're thrilled to introduce **Smart Drafts**, a new way to begin any document with momentum instead of dread. The blank page problem is real, and we wanted to meet it head-on with something that feels less like a template and more like a thoughtful collaborator nudging you forward.

Smart Drafts works with a single click. When you open a new document, give it a title, and tap the ✨ icon — we'll generate a tailored outline based on your title and the context of documents you've been working on recently. Writing a project kickoff after a week of planning notes? You'll get an outline that reflects that. Drafting a retro after a sprint? It'll know. The suggestions are yours to keep, rearrange, or toss entirely — it's a starting point, never a prescription. Everything happens in the draft itself, so your flow stays uninterrupted.

This is just the beginning. We're already working on **custom voice training**, which will let Smart Drafts learn the way *you* write — your cadence, your phrasing, the little turns of language that make a document feel like yours. We'll have more to share on that in the coming months. In the meantime, give Smart Drafts a spin on your next doc and let us know what you think. As always, thank you for building with us.
